name: Applesauce Friendship Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mix starter, dry milk, flour and applesauce in a covered bowl. Set in a warm place.
Cream sugars and butter together.
Add beaten egg and mix in salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, cloves, baking soda, nuts or raisins.
Beat the mixture by hand.
Bake at 350°F for 30 to 45 minutes.
Test for doneness and allow to cool in the pan.
